overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked urban plaza with neon lighting. The player moves through a crowd of NPCs gathered near a graffiti-covered wall with integrated seating, while heavy rain falls consistently throughout the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban plaza with neon-lit concrete structures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rain-soaked plaza toward the graffiti-covered wall ahead

entered.detail: yellow neon light strips embedded in the wet concrete ground creating reflections
large concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint tags and street art
geometric concrete blocks with integrated lighting used as seating
elevated glass and metal pedestrian bridge visible above the plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a futuristic urban plaza with heavy rain falling on neon-lit concrete surfaces. The camera moves forward through the open space toward a graffiti-covered wall, passing geometric concrete structures with integrated yellow lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti wall social gathering area with integrated seating

events.description: crowd density increases as entering the main social area near the benches

agents.ego_description: moving along the graffiti wall through a group of NPCs gathered near the neon-lit benches

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing holding up a phone to take photos of the graffiti wall

entered.detail: low concrete seating with bright yellow neon underlighting where NPCs are sitting

segments.scene_description: Moving closer to the graffiti wall, the scene becomes more crowded with NPCs gathered around neon-lit concrete benches. A person in dark clothing stands in the center taking photos of the wall art while others sit on the illuminated benches. The overhead glass walkway disappears from view as the camera moves deeper into the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner seating area with access stairs

events.description: concrete stairs become visible on the left side leading upward

agents.ego_description: approaching the corner of the plaza near the stairs while passing seated NPCs

notable_agents.action: person in teal jacket and pink pants walking away toward the stairs

entered.detail: concrete staircase with metal railings leading up to the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the corner of the plaza where concrete stairs appear on the left leading upward. The graffiti wall now dominates the left side of the frame while NPCs sit on the neon-lit benches. The space feels more enclosed as the camera approaches the stairway exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a rain-soaked futuristic plaza that transitions from an open, neon-lit expanse into a crowded urban corner. It begins by gliding across wet concrete surfaces under heavy rain, passing geometric structures with integrated yellow lighting toward a distant graffiti-covered wall. As the camera draws closer, the open space fills with NPCs gathered around illuminated concrete benches, including a figure in dark clothing photographing the wall art while the overhead glass walkway fades from view. The scene then shifts toward the edge of the plaza, where the graffiti wall begins to dominate the left side of the frame. Finally, the environment feels increasingly enclosed as the camera approaches a set of concrete stairs leading upward toward the exit.
